compiled_state.title: RED test: Add version.file_path and stack config key assertions
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add structural/metadata assertions to test-onboarding-skill.sh verifying SKILL.md contains version.file_path and stack config key population from project-detect.sh.

### New Test Functions

1. **test_version_file_path_config**: Assert SKILL.md references version.file_path populated from project-detect.sh version_files output, with numbered selection when 2+ version files detected.

2. **test_stack_config_key**: Assert SKILL.md references stack config key populated from detect-stack.sh output.

### TDD Requirement
Structural/metadata validation test. Must fail RED before SKILL.md changes.

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0) after SKILL.md update
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] test_version_file_path_config function exists
  Verify: grep -q "test_version_file_path_config" tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] test_stack_config_key function exists
  Verify: grep -q "test_stack_config_key" tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
